# Delta Nine IT

> Complete IT repair and custom PC build services in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire. Precision engineering since 2006.

## Who We Are

Delta Nine IT is an independent IT repair and custom PC build specialist based in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire. Founded by Jamie Dickinson in November 2006, we have served the local community for nearly two decades. We are iTechnician certified and a Microsoft Partner.

## What We Do

- **Apple Repairs** — iPhone, iPad, iPod and Mac screen, battery, charging port, liquid damage and logic board repair
- **PC & Laptop Repairs** — screen replacement, hardware diagnostics, upgrades, same-day repairs
- **Custom PC Builds** — gaming rigs, professional workstations, home office systems; every component hand-selected and 48-hour stress-tested
- **Mobile Device Repairs** — all major brands; screen, battery, charging port, camera, software
- **Virus & Malware Removal** — complete elimination and long-term protection setup
- **Data Recovery** — from failed drives, corrupted storage, and liquid-damaged devices; no fix, no fee
- **Network & IT Setup** — home and business network configuration, Windows upgrades, data migration, email setup

## Areas Served

Stonehouse, Stroud, Gloucester, Cheltenham, and wider Gloucestershire.

## Credentials

- iTechnician Certified (Apple and PC specialist accreditation)
- Microsoft Partner (authorised Windows and Office services)
- FSB Member (Federation of Small Businesses)
- 5-star Google rated

## Contact

- Address: Langford House, 38 High Street, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2NA
- Phone: 01453 821410
- Email: sales@deltanine.co.uk
- Opening Hours: Mon 10–18, Tue–Thu 10–17, Fri 10–16, Sat 10–13, Sun/BH Closed
